name.description: The nickname for the internal account.

metadata.description: Additional data in the form of key-value pairs. Pairs can be removed by passing an empty string or `null` as the value.

parent_account_id.description: The parent internal account for this account.

counterparty_id.description: The Counterparty associated to this account.

ledger_account_id.description: The Ledger Account associated to this account.

contra_ledger_account_id.description: The Contra Ledger Account associated to this account.

external_id.description: An optional user-defined 180 character unique identifier.
